name: Greenville Lead Scraper

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 12 * * *"

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  scrape:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repo
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install requests beautifulsoup4 playwright

      - name: Install Playwright browser
        run: |
          python -m playwright install chromium

      - name: Run tax sale scraper
        run: |
          python fetch.py

      - name: Run probate scraper
        run: |
          python probate_fetch.py

      - name: Merge and score leads
        run: |
          python merge_and_score.py

      - name: Commit updated lead files
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add leads.csv probate_leads.csv master_leads.csv master_leads.json
          git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "Auto-update leads"
          git push
